package "org.eclipse.keyple.core.service.resource" as pkg {

CardResourceServiceAdapter ..|> ICardResourceService

interface "CardResource" as ICardResource

CardResourceAdapter ..|> ICardResource

CardResourceServiceAdapter "1..N" o-- "1..N" CardProfileManagerAdapter
CardResourceServiceAdapter "0..N" o-- "0..N" ReaderManagerAdapter

CardProfileManagerAdapter "0..N" o-- "0..N" CardResourceAdapter
ReaderManagerAdapter "0..N" o-- "0..N" CardResourceAdapter

CardProfileManagerAdapter ..> CardResourceAdapter : create for pool plugin
ReaderManagerAdapter ..> CardResourceAdapter : create for regular plugin

}
